novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594773708443487294","book_info":{"abstract":"无（多）女主+（仿）轮回乐园！+战斗爽！
注：多为（仿）轮回乐园任务剧情，综漫一般为综漫女角色队友。
有许多看综漫的就打个二星，只是类型不一样
釜山行→寄生兽
自从来到这综漫世界已经19年的人生，龙溪无论做什么都是顺顺利利的。
他比常人更加聪慧，比常人更加优秀，比常人更加的努力，因此也让他考入了全世界也名列前茅的秀之院学院。
且只用了半年的时间，拿下会长之位。
可惜屋漏偏逢连夜雨，名为轮回乐园的事物的出现，让他不得已的放弃了原本在秀之院学院那优渥的生活。
尤其是本就对来到这里极为气愤的他，又碰上了，让他加入侍奉部的平冢静。
还有吵吵着让自己去当他游戏策划男主的安艺伦也，对此，龙溪的选择是。
【A.说教一顿，让他明白自己的错误。】
【B.使用中国的脏话，让他见证自己的老冯起飞…】
【C.那还说啥了？吃我战争践踏！】
【D.三个全选吗？你还真是个小吃货】
只是在那之前...需要一个好的处理‘高达’的地方...听说*国那里能卖不少？
不过，龙溪井有更优的选择了。
……【角色雪之下雪乃已加入轮回乐园】
【队伍已划分】
【已选中新人世界《釜山行》】
不过，在解决下一个人之前，下来得处理一下新人了","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0be3dfdc94bfa63228e08910050b6030~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"无数文的多塔塔","author_id":"","book_id":"7594773708443487294","book_name":"乐园综漫：不给面子纯战斗的人生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600652757254554174","read_count":"39827","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"231292"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"80","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,副本,综漫,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0be3dfdc94bfa63228e08910050b6030~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363320&x-signature=X4YRKN%2FZPviHJrfEgn14uDBHcQY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2749247057829422","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"44"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221935200DB6D33D6D1921B964D8"}"}," 众口难调，写得不错，作者加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772468604,"group_id":"7594773708443487294","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2WrJw9QuHW0pSZwzB++83RFOuKL/aVGAsKfGHGZbDv6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1280251725620216","user_name":"爱吃桑拿鸡翅的张郃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1280251725620216","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":94,"fan_ranklist_title":"小文职","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594773708443487294","book_info":{"abstract":"无（多）女主+（仿）轮回乐园！+战斗爽！
